title: Craftable Chainmail (StAPI)
description: Mod for Beta 1.7.3 allowing one to craft chainmail from iron rings. Requires StationAPI.
body:
# Craftable Chainmail

A mod for Minecraft beta 1.7.3 allowing one to craft chainmail from
iron rings. Requires [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi).

See the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftable-chainmail-stapi/gallery)
for recipes.
